ID: btn-1
Name: Search
ControlType: Button
ClassName: (missing)
AutomationID: (missing)
FrameworkID: (missing)
SupportedPatterns: Invoke
SelectorSuggestions:
1. {"name":"Search","controlType":"Button"} | rationale: Name + ControlType works when AutomationID is absent.
2. {"name":"Search"} | rationale: Name-only selectors are readable but can be ambiguous.
3. {"controlType":"Button"} | rationale: ControlType-only selectors are broad and should be a fallback.
